description: This file defines REST API routes for orchestrating build and persona workflows, such as starting orchestrations, running full workflows, linking uploads, extracting and normalizing text, and managing persona drafts and finalizations within a Node.js Express backend.

methods.name: router.post('/start')
methods.description: Starts a new orchestration session and build workflow, returning orchestration details.

methods.name: router.post('/run-all')
methods.description: Runs the entire build workflow end-to-end, including linked documents and draft generation.

methods.name: router.get('/builds/:id')
methods.description: Retrieves the orchestration record for a specific build ID.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/link-upload')
methods.description: Links an upload ID and documents to an existing build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/extract-normalize')
methods.description: Derives normalized text for a build from linked documents, assuming extracted text exists.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/generate-draft')
methods.description: Generates a persona draft from normalized text, placeholder (no external AI calls).

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/regenerate-draft')
methods.description: Regenerates persona draft, supporting versioning and draft saving.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/finalize')
methods.description: Finalizes a persona, saving the final blob and optionally creating a new version.

methods.name: router.post('/finalize')
methods.description: Convenience endpoint to finalize by buildId provided in the body.

methods.name: router.post('/regenerate-draft')
methods.description: Convenience endpoint to regenerate draft by buildId, with defaults for saving draft and creating version.
